feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /b/ Random: @1776FOMO i got another book, please respond

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >Based Lord Gaben invented a BOX that you can plug in to your TELEVISION and pla…
entry.content: >Based Lord Gaben invented a BOX that you can plug in to your TELEVISION and play VIDEO GAMES from your COUCH. Literally the most revolutionary device ever conceived. Based Gaben us mere mortals are unworthy of your genius.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: echoes of aincrad
entry.content: I think the demo is good, im seeing a lot of negative feedback and people saying fatal bullet is better but I did have fun with this one, is it really that bad to anyone that played other SAO games?

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: AI in videogames
entry.content: >pay a guy to make an image >pay the guy to make three versions of an image >WEEKS waiting for the three pictures >get into chatgpt and say "generate me an old lady for a pic" >"now make her mouth open" >"now make it red like blood smeared all over" >30 seconds and you have all you need FOR FREE Let's be honest, you can pretend to be zealots as much as you want, but AI is here to stay. There's NO ARGUMENT against it that doesn't seems like something out of the mouth of a crazy religious guy hold

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Consider your dream adventure game >your favorite book/anime in game format >an …
entry.content: Consider your dream adventure game >your favorite book/anime in game format >an ideal version of a game series you like >a game you yourself have been dreaming up Does the game format/genre you imagine it in exist? Could you just plop down the characters/places/plots into a game and have it be 100% what you imagined? Or are there games that come close but drop the ball on crucial details like the size of the world, linearity, lack of world progression, disappointing combat, lack of player choice

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >The sun has fallen out of orbit and is on a collision course with earth >You an…
entry.content: >The sun has fallen out of orbit and is on a collision course with earth >You and ten other people have been randomly chosen to enter an underground nuclear shelter with enough food and provisions for the next 30 years until the Earth is habitable again. >You can bring five games with you. Which do you bring?

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: GTA 6 is getting another delay vbros..
entry.content: All mentions of GTA 6's november 19 official launch date have been removed from the official Rockstar site for GTA 6,we'll have to wait till spring 2027 to play GTA 6

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >no drm >no data collection >no targeted advertising >no reliance on the interne…
entry.content: >no drm >no data collection >no targeted advertising >no reliance on the internet >never goes out >mandated by the government to be free forever Why aren't you watching over the air TV with an antenna? It's the last remaining non-jewed form of media delivery. Normgroids are paying $80 a month to watch the World Cup when they can watch all of it for free over the air.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: 'Mutiny' Starring Jason Statham >After witnessing his billionaire boss’ murder a…
entry.content: 'Mutiny' Starring Jason Statham >After witnessing his billionaire boss’ murder and being framed for the crime, Cole Reed boards a cargo ship on a one-man crusade to avenge his boss’ death only to discover an international conspiracy.

entry.title: /int/ International: /eusum - European summer
entry.content: this thread is dedicated to the discussion of how summer affects us and it's suffering it causes. current temperatures: Spain — up to 45°C Portugal — up to 43°C France — up to 42°C Greece — up to 40°C North Macedonia — up to 40°C Italy — up to 40°C Serbia — up to 39°C Bulgaria — up to 39°C Albania — up to 39°C Bosnia & Herzegovina — up to 39°C

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Move your body, if you've got the notion. You call that dancing? Ha! Front to ba…
entry.content: Move your body, if you've got the notion. You call that dancing? Ha! Front to back in a rock-like motion. (Do the Bartman) Watch this move. Move you hips from side to side now. (Everybody in the house do the Bartman) Ooh, uh uh, uh, ai, ai. Yeah! Don't ya slip, let your feet glide now. (Do the Bateman) If ya got the groove, ya gotta use it. Ha, ha, ha! Swing it! Jack your body in time with the music. You just might start a chain reaction. Eat your heart out, Michael! Woop! Everybody in the house

entry.title: /g/ Technology: With Linux 7.2 you will finally be able to connect from one machine to another w…
entry.content: With Linux 7.2 you will finally be able to connect from one machine to another with a USB4 cable and transfer files (and potentially other resources like a webcam) using USB4STREAM: https://lore.kernel.org/all/ajk6F7w N7SNpW82A@kroah.com/ The future is here!

entry.content: >"To The Jar She Goes" Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. entry.title: /g/ Technology: GCOS7 and mainframe related stuff
entry.content: Been working for a year with GCOS7, mainly crafting JCL and writing bug report. I was kinda bummed at first, lot of old folks trying their best to piss you off, but it's kinda fun now. Is anyone working on GCOS ?

entry.title: /int/ International: What kind of autistic design for an airport is this? >4 runways >ALL overlapping…
entry.content: What kind of autistic design for an airport is this? >4 runways >ALL overlapping >parallel runways are all super close so they can't be used simultaneously basically making a 4 runway airport into an effective 1 runway airport. quite possibly the dumbest runway design on the planet.

entry.title: /int/ International: Question to Americans here
entry.content: Are most Americans aware that they’re losing the war against Iran right now, or do most of them have no fucking idea? I talked with my two American friends to see if they knew, and they don’t. Neither of them had any fucking idea there was even a war in the first place. Most non-political personalities I follow from the USA don’t even talk about it, and when I ask them, they just go "?????". Is this the norm? It seems like they care more about the World Cup than this.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Actors from wealthy and affluent backgrounds
entry.content: >Hammer has described his background as "half Jewish".[12] His paternal great-grandfather was oil tycoon and philanthropist Armand Hammer, whose parents were Jewish emigrants to the U.S. from the Russian Empire.[13][8][14] Armand's father, Julius Hammer, was from Odessa and was an early activist in the U.S. Communist Party in New York.[15][16] Armie's paternal great-grandmother was the Russian-born actress and singer Baroness Olga Vadimovna von Root, from Sevastopol, the daughter of a tsarist ge

entry.title: /int/ International: Why did I automatically know they were American before reading the lines below ?…
entry.content: Why did I automatically know they were American before reading the lines below ? When I see photos of celebrities from England or Germany, or even Europe more generally, it's much more complicated. They could be French just as easily as they could be German. But for this pic related, I know right away it's American.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: For me, it’s the Steam Machine.
entry.content: The best piece of living-room gaming hardware. I even ask for extra Steam Controller dongles and the staff at Valve is so friendly and more than willing to oblige. One time I asked for a Steam Controller dongle and they gave me three. I said, "Wow, three for free!" and the nice friendly Valve hardware engineer laughed and said, "I'm going to call you 3-for-free!". Now the SteamOS update screen greets me with "hey it’s 3-for-free!" and ALWAYS gives me three USB dongles per controller. It's such a

entry.content: ITT: aesthetic dishonesty

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >Further delays were incurred when Richard Burton, well known for his drinking b…
entry.content: >Further delays were incurred when Richard Burton, well known for his drinking binges, disappeared for several days, with his friends Peter O'Toole, Trevor Howard and Richard Harris. Joint stated that at one point during production, Burton was so drunk that he knocked himself out while filming and Joint had to quickly fill in for him. Derren Nesbitt observed that Burton was drinking as many as four bottles of vodka per day.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: First bike
entry.content: Hello br/o/s. I'm gonna get my motorcycle license soon and I was wondering if Kawasaki Ninja 300 is a good starter bike. By law I can't get anything beyond 400cc and 35kw and Ninja seems like the most reasonable option so far. If you can recommend me something else that's in the similar price range it would be very cool of you :))))

entry.title: /g/ Technology: What are the gayest trends in technology?
entry.content: I'm start: HTPCs were for retards who couldn't route an HDMI cable to their living room. Audiophiles, aka people that care about spending money to try to enhance quality of listening to music instead of quality of music. Brandfags who think esoteric apple or Thinkpad knowledge is a personality.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Fake car shit
entry.content: I'm on Instagram a lot and I see a ton of weird shit happen to cars that makes no sense. >cars rolling away after parking How the hell do they trick their car into going into drive or neutral while stepping out of it? The car goes into park whenever the door opens! >cars being stolen How is this even possible if a car requires not only a card/phone, but also a PIN code to unlock? >carjacking Same as above. If the driver's side door is opened, you need to put in a PIN code to unlock. >people fall

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Kazakh foid making the rounds on the internet
entry.content: So what I'm trying to say is, you just have to be a woman and be somewhat conventionally attractive to win at life. It's been what, a week? And she's got already >108k subs on ig >interview with the biggest news page on ig from her city >invited to a dragrace from a local car dealership >basically all russian-speaking news outlets are reporting on her >had a photoshoot, with a caption about "looks aren't everything" It doesn't sound like much yet, but in my opinion that is not the end of the sto

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >Privacy-based app or website >requires registration, and/or email or phone numb…
entry.content: >Privacy-based app or website >requires registration, and/or email or phone number I might as well give you my driver’s license. I don't care if they say it prevents bots or any bullshit. if you require any of those, then it's not private.

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: A thread for RP in the world of Harahel, a world of fantasy, magic, and adventur…
entry.content: A thread for RP in the world of Harahel, a world of fantasy, magic, and adventure. Drawing on tropes from RPGs both east and west, fantasy literature, and anime, the setting is constantly in flux, decided in large part by the players themselves. To join, download the CYOA through the link and create a character. When making a build, try to include some information about your character if you plan to RP besides just the build. Optional of course, but it encourages others to ask questions and talk

entry.title: /news/ News: FEC filings confirm GOP meddling in Dem primaries
entry.content: https://www.politico.com/news/2026/ 06/21/fec-republican-meddling-democ ratic-primaries-00969281 A Republican-linked group was the sole funded of two pop-up super PACs that spent more than $4.3 million across a swath of Democratic congressional primaries to support candidates seen as less electable. Democrats had speculated that the two groups, Real Change PAC and Lead Left, were Republican meddling as they spent heavily across Democratic primary races in Texas, Pennsylvania, New Jersey, Nebrask

entry.title: /news/ News: Trump admnistration plans to use homeland security funds to pressure states into election changes
entry.content: https://www.cnn.com/2026/06/22/poli tics/homeland-security-grants-elect ion-changes The Trump administration is threatening to withhold tens of millions of dollars in federal homeland security funds from states unless they adopt a sweeping set of election changes, according to multiple sources and internal documents obtained by CNN. The move is part of President Donald Trump’s campaign to root out alleged voter fraud — despite studies showing it’s far rarer than he claims — and exert more federa
